author: qu0b
content:
Update on glamsterdam-devet-7 block building <https://panda-uploads-production.devops-539.workers.dev/panda/uploads/20bd08/glamsterdam-devnet-7-self-built-blocks.html>

It goes over the last 3 days of builder vs self-hosted building and the time to create payloads under load.

Interesting insights this surfaces:
- Teku self-builds 83.5% of blocks
- 23.4% are self built / 76.6% of blocks are built via buildoor
- Reth has the lowest number of transactions in the self-built payloads by a lot.
- Nethermind self builds the biggest blocks with a median of 135 transactions.
- Reth seems to have very few transactions in its mempool at a time compared to other nodes (is this a setting issue?)
- nimbusel has the slowest median newPalyoad time
- Tree clients P99 `engine_getPayload` is near or over the 1s deadline for block building
-  besus `engine_getPayload` stayed considerably slower after the spam wave finished.
